layers.name: aie

changelog.v1.0: Agent Improvement Engine - Event capture + quality scoring for Protheus outputs. NO autonomy. Sensing/evaluation only.
changelog.v1.0.1: Evidence-gated tests_passed scoring (+10 requires test log hash). Auto-hash computation. Warnings for unverified claims.
changelog.v1.0.2: Auto-capture test runs via aie_run.js wrapper; reduces cherry-picking. test_run events score +6/-6 based on exit_code.

features: Event schema: client/config/aie_schema_v1.json with 10 event types
Logger: append-only JSONL at state/aie/events/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl
Scorer: computes AQS (Agent Quality Score) from verifiable events only
Evidence-gated: +10 requires test_log_path + test_log_sha256
Auto-capture: aie_run.js wrapper executes commands, logs output, auto-emits test_run events
Auto-hash: logger computes sha256 automatically when test_log_path provided
test_run scoring: +6 passing (exit_code=0), -6 failing (exit_code≠0)
Warnings: unverified tests_passed claims emit CLI warnings
Scoring: +10 verified passing, +5 unverified/failing, -20 violation, -10 claim without artifact
Daily cap: ±50 points, rolling 7/30-day averages
NO minutes/revenue tracking - pure output quality
NO autonomy - human approval required for all actions

layers.name: dopamine_engine

changelog.v1.0: Initial SDS engine with high-leverage tags, streaks, drift penalties
changelog.v1.1: Artifact-first scoring with anti-gaming validation (1.5x requires proof)
changelog.v1.1.1: Structured artifacts/revenue arrays, capped bonuses (+6 artifact, +6 revenue), 10 achievements, Auto-Capture Proof, Git Hook
changelog.v1.1.2: Global git hook capture: works across ALL repos, enriched payload (repo_name, branch, remote), anti-noise guards, recursion protection
changelog.v1.2.0: AGENT MODE: Synthetic dopamine system for Protheus. agentLog(), agentTaskStart/Complete, agentCelebrate(), immediate positive feedback. Removed git hooks - now agent-self-tracking only.

features: Artifact-conditional high-leverage: 1.5x with proof, 1.0x without
Structured artifact objects: type, ref, sha256, meta
Structured revenue actions: kind, ref with +6/day cap
Artifact bonus: +3 first, +1 additional (cap +6)
Daily closeout command with suggestions
Achievement system (10 badges)
Auto-capture with SHA256 hash computation
AGENT MODE: Synthetic dopamine for AI agent work
agentLog(): Quick task logging with immediate celebration
agentTaskStart/Complete: Full task lifecycle tracking
agentCelebrate(): Immediate positive feedback (emoji + phrase)
agentStats(): Agent productivity metrics
Zero-friction CLI aliases: sw, rev, done, sc
Git hooks DISABLED (pivoted to agent-only tracking)
Sensory Layer integration: closeout triggers capture (18h lookback)

layers.name: sensory_layer

changelog.v1.0: CAPTURE step: Append-only event log for high-signal raw inputs. File changes, git state, manual notes.
changelog.v1.1: DIGEST step: Rule-based digest generator (deterministic). Daily/weekly digests, anomaly detection. NO LLM.
changelog.v1.1.1: Metric integrity fix: explicit git_dirty_* fields, signal_ratio is NUMBER, auto-run digest after capture.
changelog.v1.1.2: Health breadcrumbs: digest_generated/digest_failed events logged to raw JSONL for observability.
changelog.v1.1.3: Repo-safe git capture: no fatal errors, HEAD-guarded, stderr suppressed. Truthful tests with awaitDigest.
changelog.v1.2.0: INSIGHT step: Digest → Proposals generator (deterministic rules). Reads ONLY digests+anomalies, NEVER raw JSONL. NO LLM, NO auto-execution.
changelog.v1.2.1: PROPOSAL QUEUE: proposal lifecycle logging + dispositions (deterministic). Appendix-only queue_log.jsonl.
changelog.v1.3.0: External Eyes framework (run/score/evolve), deterministic - controlled external intel with budgets, scoring, evolution. NO LLM.

features: CAPTURE: Append-only JSONL logs: state/sensory/raw/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl
DIGEST: Daily digests state/sensory/digests/YYYY-MM-DD.md
DIGEST: Weekly digests state/sensory/digests/YYYY-WW.md
ANOMALIES: Rule-based detection in state/sensory/anomalies/YYYY-MM-DD.json
INSIGHT v1.2.0: Digest → Proposals generator (deterministic)
INSIGHT v1.2.0: Daily proposals state/sensory/proposals/YYYY-MM-DD.json
INSIGHT v1.2.0: Daily insights state/sensory/insights/YYYY-MM-DD.md
INSIGHT v1.2.0: Weekly insights state/sensory/insights/YYYY-WW.md
INSIGHT v1.2.0: 5 deterministic rules (file spike, churn, dirty, aqs drop, low signal)
INSIGHT v1.2.0: Evidence array with source+path+match for traceability
INSIGHT v1.2.0: Validation plan + suggested command + risk/impact scoring
INSIGHT v1.2.0: SENSORY_TEST_DIR env var for isolated testing
INSIGHT v1.2.0: NEVER reads raw JSONL (enforced)
GIT v1.1.3: Repo-safe capture (no fatal errors from non-repos)
GIT v1.1.3: HEAD-guarded (handles fresh repos without commits)
GIT v1.1.3: Stderr suppressed, no output leak
TESTING v1.1.3: capture({awaitDigest:true}) for deterministic tests
HEALTH v1.1.2: digest_generated events on success
HEALTH v1.1.2: digest_failed events on failure (error truncated to 200 chars)
METRICS v1.1.1: git_dirty_events, git_dirty_changed_count_max/avg/last (all numbers)
AUTO-DIGEST: capture() auto-runs digest after completion (non-blocking)
Work roots config: client/config/work_roots.json
Anti-spam caps: max 50 events/run, 25 files/root
Dopamine integration: auto-triggers on closeout (18h lookback)
QUEUE v1.2.1: Proposal lifecycle logging (ingest, accept, reject, done, snooze)
QUEUE v1.2.1: state/sensory/queue_log.jsonl (append-only)
QUEUE v1.2.1: Recurring proposal detection (same title across 2+ days)
EXTERNAL EYES v1.3.0: Config at client/adaptive/sensory/eyes/catalog.json
EXTERNAL EYES v1.3.0: Run/score/evolve commands
EXTERNAL EYES v1.3.0: Domain allowlisting + budget enforcement
EXTERNAL EYES v1.3.0: Score EMA tracking with cadence evolution
EXTERNAL EYES v1.3.0: Probation/active/dormant/retired states
EXTERNAL EYES v1.3.0: Auto-run from sensory_capture (post-capture, max 3 eyes)
EXTERNAL EYES v1.3.0: NO real APIs yet (stub collectors)

layers.name: tiered_directives

changelog.v1.0: T0 invariants and T1 northstar constraint system

features: T0 non-negotiable blocks
T1 strategic northstars
Approval gate with YAML persistence

layers.name: websocket_stability
features: Server ping/pong every 20s
Client exponential backoff reconnect
Event buffer (500 events / 10 min)

layers.name: exec_compacted

changelog.v1.0: Global exec wrapper with audit enforcement

features: Enforced child_process wrapper
CI audit for direct exec usage
